tasks.title: Set up Telegram bot infrastructure and basic command handling framework
Integrate cryptocurrency price API for fetching current prices
Design database schema for storing tracked coins and price history
Implement /track command to add cryptocurrencies to monitoring list
Implement /list command to display currently tracked cryptocurrencies
Implement /remove command to delete cryptocurrencies from tracking list
Create price monitoring system that polls tracked coins periodically
Implement 5% price change detection logic with 24-hour interval calculation
Integrate Telegram notifications for price alerts with message formatting
Implement persistent storage for tracked coins and price history between sessions
